title: Pack of 50 cartridge tips, silicone tips, silicone syringe attachments, silicone nozzles for adhesive sealant and cartridge gun
features: Cartridge press accessories: these silicone nozzles are the perfect cartridge press and silicone press replacement accessories. It reduces the waste of goods, extends the life of the adhesive and helps you repair the edges, corners and joints of the wall.

Sealed Nozzle Cap Set: 50 white nozzle discs, packed in a box, which makes it easier for you to carry, with enough quantity to meet your daily needs. Apply glue to wall joints and cracks to maintain aesthetics.

High Quality Materials Our silicone sealing nozzles are made of high quality plastic, which prevents bending, corrosion resistant, durable and thornless, durable, odorless. Can be used for a long time.
Packaging: you will receive 50 pieces cartridge tips.The length of the white replacement silicone nozzle measures about 10 cm. Lightweight and easy to carry.

Widely Used It can be used for construction, industry and households. It is used for sewing and patching door and window installation tools; for daily maintenance, such as repairing holes, cracks, wall tiles, floor tiles and floors.
description: Description: Cartridge tips can be used in a variety of applications, from construction to industrial sectors, as a tool for door and window installation or for daily maintenance, for repairing floor tiles, grout etc. The perfect seamless combination of the rubber nozzle and nut can store the unused glue and not harden, which is convenient for the next use and reduces waste. Product details: Colour: white. Material: Plastic Package includes: Pack of 50 cartridge tips.
